first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the mean delta across all runs for this cell is zero. The qualitative feedback in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording and emphasis (e.g., framing cloud experience as "no Azure" vs. "tangential... AWS CDK, but no Azure") fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the candidate's location changing from Berlin to Bangalore.
